response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems work; their background is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or C++-centric systems design, making them a poor fit for the role’s core technical requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Demonstrated ability to lead ambiguous projects and build developer tooling
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed systems at scale
Lacks formal technical leadership experience in cloud or DevOps engineering teams
